Department readiness mapping

1,777-Department Runtime Map

Map all command-center departments to supervised runtime readiness without activating the full agent registry. This page is a real backend-connected mapping surface, not activation, and it stays inside the safety boundary.

Total registered agents: 47,979 Total departments: 1,777 Total units: 5,331 Total families: 175 Live runtime agents enabled: 0–1,000 from MVP-58
Department runtime mapping: 1,777 departments Full 47,979 activation: blocked Command execution: disabled Deploy execution: disabled Rollback execution: disabled Alert sending: disabled
Runtime mapping status Loading... Runtime mapping is not activation.
Mapped departments 1,777 All departments remain read-only by default.
Runtime lanes 100 Lane coverage inherited from MVP-58.
Runtime subdivisions 10 Subdivision coverage inherited from MVP-58.
Live runtime agents enabled 0–1,000 Controlled by the runtime division backend.
Kill switch Visible Visible boundary, not executable from this page.

Search departments and narrow by runtime status, family, unit, or lane. Mapping is not activation.
